# customerUnsync

Unsyncs a managed customer from the its current data source. External IDs mapping to the external source will be cleared.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`CustomerPayload`](../objects/customer_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The identifier of the customer to unsync. |
